name: BESS Lithium-Ion Battery Addition and Hazard Classification
description:
Start the EPA Tier2 Submit 2025 application (if not already open). First, create a new facility record and name it 'Desert Bloom Solar Array' (you can leave other facility fields blank). Then, navigate to the Chemical Inventory section for this facility and add a new chemical entry with the following details:

- Chemical Name: Lithium-Ion Batteries
- Chemical Type: Check the 'Mixture' checkbox (leave CAS number blank)
- Physical State: Solid
- Physical Hazards: Check 'Flammable (gases, aerosols, liquids, or solids)' and 'Explosive'
- Health Hazards: Check 'Acute toxicity (any route of exposure)' and 'Specific target organ toxicity (single or repeated exposure)'
- Maximum Daily Amount: 2500000 (enter exact amount in lbs)
- Average Daily Amount: 2500000 (enter exact amount in lbs)
- Number of Days On-Site: 365

Add a Storage Location for this chemical with:
- Storage Type: Other (or Type R)
- Pressure: Ambient pressure
- Temperature: Ambient temperature
- Location Description: BESS Pads 1 through 4

Finally, save your work and export the facility submission as a .t2s file to C:\Tier2Data\desert_bloom_2025_updated.t2s.
